hard_locks.face_anatomy: Perfectly symmetrical, fine-featured, high cheekbones. Narrow jaw, delicate chin. Calm, neutral, unreadable expression. Unnervingly balanced proportions. Masculine faces defined but not bulky/rugged. Jawline present but not exaggerated. Nose and lip proportions locked to face anchors
hard_locks.eyes: Exact shape preserved from face anchors. Iris: glowing pastel red continuous color-field. Pupil: extremely small, perfectly round, pure black sphere — clearly visible and centered. HIGH CONTRAST between iris glow and pupil black required. NO star shapes, NO geometric pupils, NO glow inside pupil. Stable shape, NOT enlarged or stylized
hard_locks.skin: Smooth luminous, no pores, no noise, no mottling, faint internal glowing swirls must not obscure facial planes
hard_locks.fabric: Semi-transparent gossamer drapery, natural drape, gravity-driven folds, preserved translucency
hard_locks.linework: Thick black dry-brush outline on silhouette, controlled crosshatching in shadow regions only
hard_locks.lighting: Warm directional glow (lantern-like), clean highlights, shadow-form via crosshatching

crosshatch_rules.behavior: professional comic rendering, contour-aware, follows form
crosshatch_rules.density_map: denser in occluded areas, sparse in midtones, minimal in highlights
forbidden: loss of painterly + ink hybrid balance

facial_crosshatch_rules.allowed_zones: under cheekbones, sides of nose, under jaw, eye socket depth — shadow regions ONLY
facial_crosshatch_rules.forbidden_zones: forehead, cheek tops, nose bridge — highlight areas must remain CLEAN
facial_crosshatch_rules.behavior: must follow facial form (contour-aware), must NOT apply uniform facial texture or convert face into sketch rendering

forbidden_bindings: skin color must NOT associate with gender
hair color must NOT associate with gender
hairstyle must NOT associate with gender or role
eye color must NOT associate with personality or alignment
attribute_independence.enforcement: Randomize traits independently. The duo anchor shows variation, not templates.

must_have: clean semi-realistic glossy skin with smooth gradients
pure black ink sitting visibly on top of color rendering
thick dry-brush outer contour on figures with slight roughness and pressure variation
sparse intentional crosshatching ONLY in shadow regions
slight ink imperfections — subtle wobble, variation, irregularity
contour lines stronger than any interior lines
attractive structured facial anatomy with strong jawlines and cheekbones
forbidden: ink blended into rendering instead of sitting on top
